text:
It was a lovely autumn afternoon. Tom decided to take his pet parrot, Polly, to the park. Polly gripped Tom’s finger tightly.

“So interesting!” Polly exclaimed. “Our world is full of fascinating things! Have you ever heard of the Great Ape intelligence?”

“Nope! Just parrots?” Tom chuckled. “I’ve heard they’re good at mimicking human voices.”

They strolled along a lush green path. Birds sang sweetly. A group of squirrelly rabbits dashed across the flowers.

Suddenly, Polly clucked loudly. Tom froze.

“What’s wrong?”

“Do those look like little foxes?”

“They could be dogs!” Tom carefully approached. They circled each other warily. Then—

With a swift flip, Polly sent a small branch zooming through the air. It caught one of the rabbits!

“Good Polly!” Tom cheered.

“Let’s go!” They resumed their walk.

Near the pond, a strange shadow flickered. Just a shadow...
